name: Ollama NVIDIA
short_description: Run large language models locally on NVIDIA GPUs - Llama, Mistral, CodeLlama, and hundreds more.
description: Ollama NVIDIA is optimized for running large language models on NVIDIA GPUs. It supports hundreds of models including Llama 2/3, Mistral, CodeLlama, Phi, and many more. GPU acceleration provides significantly faster inference compared to CPU-only execution. Just download a model and start chatting or integrate via API. It handles model downloading, memory management, and GPU optimization automatically. Perfect for privacy-conscious AI enthusiasts with NVIDIA GPUs who want to run their own AI without cloud dependencies.
usecases: Run Llama 2, Mistral, or other open-source LLMs completely offline with GPU acceleration.
Build AI-powered applications that use local models via REST API with fast inference.
Experiment with different AI models on your NVIDIA GPU without API costs.
Create a private AI assistant for coding, writing, or analysis with GPU-accelerated performance.
notes: Requires NVIDIA GPU with CUDA support
NVIDIA Docker runtime required - install nvidia-docker for GPU passthrough
Models downloaded on first use - expect several GB per model
API available at port 11434 for integration with other apps
Significantly faster inference compared to CPU-only Ollama
